description: Golden test corpus for evaluating the Vadapav RAG pipeline.

test_cases.query: What is the actual text content of my note?
expected_key_points: The note contains text about actual text content

test_cases.query: Show me all the code blocks in my notes
expected_key_points: There is a Python code block with print Hello World

test_cases.query: What blocks are tagged with summary and todo?
expected_key_points: Multiple blocks are tagged with summary and todo
These include the actual text content block, the ActiveNote Manager block, and the Second Block

test_cases.query: How do the different blocks in my love-this-shit note relate to each other?
expected_key_points: The note contains multiple text blocks and a code block
Some blocks share tags (summary, todo) indicating they are related
The note appears to be a test note with various types of content

test_cases.query: Was anything updated via the backend?
expected_key_points: A block was updated via ActiveNote Manager
A test block was added via Backend at 14:32:22
